message:
feat(web): add 8 production middleware types for T5.4 stack parity

Add CompressionMiddleware, RequestBodyLimitMiddleware, RequestIdMiddleware,
AuthMiddleware, LoadShedMiddleware, CatchPanicMiddleware,
NormalizePathMiddleware, and SetResponseHeaderMiddleware. Extend
MiddlewareStack builder with methods for all new types. 67 tests.

Also fix clippy lint in net/happy_eyeballs.rs (redundant closure).

(asupersync-2oh2u.5.4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
